message.content:
@startuml
participant "Control" as Control #LightBlue200
participant "Graph" as Graph #LightBlue200
participant "nodes[i]:Node" as Node #LightBlue200
participant "ants[i]:Ant" as Ant #LightBlue200

note right of Control : Start point for sequence\n(implicit activation)

activate Control
Control ->> Graph: getNodes()
deactivate Graph
return nodes

loop [nodes] 
    opt [nodes[i].getContent() instanceof FreeNode]
        activate Node
        Note over Node,Ant : Get ants from node content
        control->node:getAnts()\nfrms
        
        loop[fourmis]
            if[ants[i] instanceOf MovableAnt ] then
                ant-->ant:move()
                
            
        
         endif
            
      end
      
      
   deactivate  Node
   
   
endif


end



@enduml
